state.next-action:
Session 2026-04-11 — cleanup done, planning page redesigned, ID format decided.
=== COMPLETED === - Planning page: GanttChart at top + tabbed view (Phases/Tasks/Decisions/Bugs) - Bugs moved to eval project detail pages (ProjectBugsSection) - Requirements version history on project detail (paginated, shows what changed per round) - Skill provenance tracking in TRACE.json (start_snapshot, installed, inherited) - Phase status fix on /planning page (regex bug in parsePlanningState) - gad self-eval CLI command - /quickstart and /eval-guide site routes - ID format decided (GAD-125): per-project namespace + type prefix (GAD-D-119, ETD-T-3-01)
=== CLEANUP RESULTS === Archived to .planning/archive/session-2026-04-09/: - DISCUSS-PHASE-25.md, DISCUSS-PHASE-27.md (pre-planning discussion notes) - ASSUMPTIONS.md, GAPS.md, SKEPTIC.md, SESSION-REFLECTION-2026-04-09.md, SKILL-FINDABILITY-2026-04-09.md Kept: ISOLATION-AUDIT-2026-04-10.md (valuable reference) Kept: plans/phase-25/PLAN.md, plans/phase-27/PLAN.md (enhance review content)
=== ENHANCE FINDINGS FROM PLANS === Phase 25 (trace v4): Most tasks DONE (25-01 through 25-10 shipped). NOT done: site rendering tasks 25-15 through 25-22, e2e tests. Consider closing phase 25 as substantially complete. Phase 27 (structured data): Partially done (rubric radar exists, human review rubric in gad.json). NOT done: gad eval query, /insights page, derived metrics pipeline, chart components.
=== OPEN PLANNED TASKS (15 remaining) === 21-23b: Retry GAD v11 (api-interrupted investigation) 21-24: Brownfield round 1 22-22: Per-run page composite formula breakdown 22-26: Scoring weights per project 22-27: framework-upgrade skill (already exists, task may be stale) 22-30: Agent runtimes comparison table 22-33: gad install CLI wrapper 22-44: Fresh-clone contribution test 22-45: Remotion scaffold (second half) 22-47: /standards page 22-49: Skill collision detection at prebuild 22-50: Extract thinking blocks from session.jsonl 22-52: Per-skill evaluation harness
=== NEXT SESSION === 1. Implement new ID format in CLI output + new IDs going forward 2. Build HoverCard Ref component with color-coded ID segments 3. Review 15 open planned tasks — cancel stale ones 4. Consider closing phases 20 and 25 as substantially done 5. Run first eval with skills installed (round 5 GAD+Skills test) 6. User plays round 5 builds
